summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Coffee Grounds iteration 2 - website rebranding, CUKP section implementation, and Spotify playlist integration. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API tests - 24/24 passed (100% success rate)
Website branding updated to 'Coffee Grounds' in navbar and footer
CUKP navigation link properly positioned between Home and Map
CUKP page loads with all sections: title, stats sidebar, quote, founders
CUKP teaser section on homepage with quote and 4 stats
Admin login works with new credentials test123/12345
Admin dashboard shows playlist badges for shops with playlist URLs
Admin form includes Spotify Playlist URL field
Shop detail pages show 'The Sound of {shop name}' Spotify section
GET /api/shops returns shops with playlist_url field
All existing features preserved: search, sort, map view, ratings
Shop listings, detailed pages, and user interactions working
